Operation 'searchCocktails' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Original summary is too generic. Description is completely missing, making it impossible for AI agents to understand search capabilities, parameters, or expected results. Enhanced version clarifies search criteria, parameter requirements, return format, and matching behavior.

data.summary_suggestion: Search cocktails by name or ingredient
data.description_suggestion: Searches the cocktail database by name or ingredient. Accepts a search query parameter to find matching cocktails. Returns a list of cocktail objects containing basic information (ID, name, thumbnail image). Partial name matches are supported. Returns empty results if no matches found.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic. Description is completely missing, making it impossible for AI agents to understand search capabilities, parameters, or expected results. Enhanced version clarifies search criteria, parameter requirements, return format, and matching behavior.

message: Operation 'lookupDetails' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Summary is somewhat clear but description is missing entirely. AI agents need to understand: which ID types are accepted, what comprehensive data is returned, parameter constraints, and the mutually-exclusive nature of the two ID parameters. Enhanced description provides this critical context.

data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve full cocktail or ingredient details
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves complete details for a specific cocktail or ingredient by ID. Accepts either a cocktail ID or ingredient ID parameter. Returns comprehensive cocktail object (including ingredients, measurements, instructions, images) or ingredient object (including description, type, ABV). Only one ID type should be provided per request.
data.reasoning: Summary is somewhat clear but description is missing entirely. AI agents need to understand: which ID types are accepted, what comprehensive data is returned, parameter constraints, and the mutually-exclusive nature of the two ID parameters. Enhanced description provides this critical context.

message: Operation 'getRandomCocktail' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Summary is clear and actionable. Description is missing, leaving AI agents uncertain about return format and whether results vary per request. Enhanced description clarifies that full cocktail details are returned and that results are randomized per invocation.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a randomly selected cocktail from the database. Requires no parameters. Returns a complete cocktail object with all details including ingredients, measurements, preparation instructions, and images. Each request returns a different random cocktail.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and actionable. Description is missing, leaving AI agents uncertain about return format and whether results vary per request. Enhanced description clarifies that full cocktail details are returned and that results are randomized per invocation.

message: Operation 'filterCocktails' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Summary is too vague about available filter types. Description is completely missing. AI agents need to understand: what filter options are available, how to apply them, whether multiple filters can be combined, and what data is returned. Enhanced version clarifies filter types, parameter usage, and result format.

data.summary_suggestion: Filter cocktails by category, glass type, or ingredient
data.description_suggestion: Filters cocktails by specific criteria including category, glass type, ingredient, or alcoholic content. Accepts filter parameters to narrow results. Returns a list of cocktail objects matching the specified filter criteria. Only one filter type should be applied per request. Results include cocktail ID, name, and thumbnail image.
data.reasoning: Summary is too vague about available filter types. Description is completely missing. AI agents need to understand: what filter options are available, how to apply them, whether multiple filters can be combined, and what data is returned. Enhanced version clarifies filter types, parameter usage, and result format.

data.current_summary: List categories, glasses, ingredients, or alcoholic filters
data.summary_suggestion: List available filter options and categories
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves available options for filtering and categorizing cocktails. Supports listing categories, glass types, ingredients, or alcoholic content classifications. Accepts a parameter to specify which option type to retrieve. Returns an array of available values for the requested option type. Useful for populating filter dropdowns or understanding available search criteria.

AI agents need to understand: what each option type represents, how to request specific types, return format, and use cases.
